{{Quote|A privateer that thinks serving the Empire is somehow socially elevating.|[[Leonia Tavira]]|<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Masquerade">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Masquerade]]''</ref>}}
'''Kavil''' was a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] who led the [[Kavil's Corsairs]] pirate group. He was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] with blue eyes, balding brown hair, and a heavily-scarred face.

In the months after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] he became an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] privateer through the hope of attaining social promotion for his duties. He was eventually supplanted by [[Leonia Tavira]].

{{Char-stub}}
